text:
I see the issue now! Look at line 536 - we're checking if `fromChain.id === toChain.id` and blocking the swap. But for Ethereum (id: 1) to Solana (id: 792703809), those IDs are different, so that's not the issue.

The real problem is likely that when you select Solana tokens, they might have the same address format as Ethereum tokens (`0x000...` for native). Let me add detailed logging to see what's being sent:
